content.situation: 朋友在聚会结束时对你说：'This was such a wonderful evening, I really appreciate you hosting us.' 你需要礼貌回应并表达祝福。
content.speakerText: This was such a wonderful evening, I really appreciate you hosting us.
content.speakerTextCn: 今晚太棒了，非常感谢你招待我们。

blanks.answer: Take care and let's do this again soon!
options: Take care and let's do this again soon!

content.hint: 回应感谢时，先表示不客气，再加入祝福和未来再见的表达更自然。
content.knowledgePoint: 礼貌告别中的感谢回应与祝福表达

content.situation: 同事在下班前对你说：'Thanks for helping me finish the report—I couldn't have done it without you.' 你需要简短而温暖地回应并告别。
content.speakerText: Thanks for helping me finish the report—I couldn't have done it without you.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你帮我完成报告，没有你我真做不到。
content.hint: 在表达感谢后，用祝福语收尾比单纯说再见更显体贴。
content.knowledgePoint: 职场场景中感谢回应与温馨祝福

content.situation: 你和邻居在门口告别，对方说：'Thanks for watching my cat this week—it means a lot to me.' 你需要用温暖的方式回应并结束对话。
content.speakerText: Thanks for watching my cat this week—it means a lot to me.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你这周照看我的猫，这对我意义重大。

blanks.answer: Take care and give my kitty a hug!
options: Take care and give my kitty a hug!
No worries, see you next week.

content.hint: 回应时结合对方提到的具体细节（如猫）会让祝福更贴心自然。
content.knowledgePoint: 社区场景中个性化感谢回应与情感化祝福
